summary: A single-day local picnic on 4 April 2009: Simon, Eve, and the dog drove to the Trimpley area near Bewdley, picked up friends Helen and Margaret, and had a picnic lunch at Hampton Loade on the River Severn in Shropshire. No overnight stop; the whole outing was a day trip from Birmingham.
extraction_notes: This is a one-page, single-day local outing. The page text is truncated ('at Hampton ? Lode, by the'). The place name '[?Trumpby]' is flagged uncertain in the transcription; the trip title spells it 'Trimpley', matching Trimpley Reservoir near Bewdley — recorded with approximate=true. 'Tonic' in the text is likely a transcription variant for the dog Tinder. The photo caption 'Peckover House, Cambridgeshire, The Drawing Room' appears on the same page but relates to a separate photograph, not this trip's route. No crossings. Helen and Margaret are guests, not family members, so not listed in travellers.
